x-enumeration-literals.name: BonusPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of a bonus.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashManagementTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a general cash management instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardBulkClearing
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that is settling money for a bulk of card transactions, while referring to a specific transaction file or other information like terminal ID, card acceptor ID or other transaction details.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditCardPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment of credit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TradeSettlementPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to settlement of a trade, eg a foreign exchange deal or a securities transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DebitCardPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment of debit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of dividends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DeliverAgainstPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Code used to pre-advise the account servicer of a forthcoming deliver against payment instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Epayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to ePayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FeeCollection
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that is settling card transaction related fees between two parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: GovernmentPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a payment to or from a government department.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hedging
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the payment of a hedging operation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IrrevocableCreditCardPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is reimbursement of credit card payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IrrevocableDebitCardPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is reimbursement of debit card payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IntraCompanyPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is an intra-company payment, ie, a payment between two companies belonging to the same group.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the transfer of a loan to a borrower.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commercial
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mobile P2B Payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Consumer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mobile P2P Payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other payment purpose.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PensionPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of pension.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Represented
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collection used to re-present previously reversed or returned direct debit transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReimbursementReceivedCreditTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a reimbursement for commercial reasons of a correctly received credit transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReceiveAgainstPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Code used to pre-advise the account servicer of a forthcoming receive against payment instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SalaryPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of salaries.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Securities
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of securities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SocialSecurityBenefit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is a social security benefit, ie payment made by a government to support individuals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SupplierPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a payment to a supplier.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of taxes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trade
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the payment of a trade finance transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TreasuryPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to treasury operations.  E.g. financial contract settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ValueAddedTaxPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of value added tax.

x-enumeration-literals.name: WithHolding
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is the payment of withholding tax.
